news.title:
CARE Ratings assigned CARE A Stable to Allcargo's Rs 33 cr LT facilities.
CARE reaffirmed CARE A Stable/CARE A2 for Rs 260 cr LT-ST facilities.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings assigned CARE A Stable to Allcargo's Rs 33 cr LT facilities.
CARE reaffirmed CARE A Stable/CARE A2 for Rs 260 cr LT-ST facilities.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics Ltd announces analyst/investor meeting on March 18, 2026.
Meeting with Muddy Waters Capital; discussions based on publicly available data.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics Ltd announces analyst/investor meeting on March 18, 2026.
Meeting with Muddy Waters Capital; discussions based on publicly available data.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics Board to use Rs 64.7 cr unutilised QIP for corporate purposes.
ICRA will monitor the utilisation of funds raised by merged entity Allcargo Gati.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics Board to use Rs 64.7 cr unutilised QIP for corporate purposes.
ICRA will monitor the utilisation of funds raised by merged entity Allcargo Gati.

news.title:
CARE Ratings affirms stable outlook for Allcargo's Rs 255 crore bank facilities.
Strong logistics presence, synergies, promoter support, and liquidity drive rating stability.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings affirms stable outlook for Allcargo's Rs 255 crore bank facilities.
Strong logistics presence, synergies, promoter support, and liquidity drive rating stability.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics schedules investor meet on March 9, 2026, at Arihant Capital's Bharat Connect Conference.
The presentation for Q3FY26 is publicly available; no UPSI will be discussed during the virtual meeting.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics schedules investor meet on March 9, 2026, at Arihant Capital's Bharat Connect Conference.
The presentation for Q3FY26 is publicly available; no UPSI will be discussed during the virtual meeting.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics expands trans-shipment centres from 21 to 71.
Serviceable pin codes to rise from 4,900 to over 10,000 for e-commerce growth.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics expands trans-shipment centres from 21 to 71.
Serviceable pin codes to rise from 4,900 to over 10,000 for e-commerce growth.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics reported 7% revenue growth, 9% EBITDA rise, and 50% PBT increase in Q3.
Express division achieved its highest monthly revenue in Dec 2025; focus remains on quality and growth.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics reported 7% revenue growth, 9% EBITDA rise, and 50% PBT increase in Q3.
Express division achieved its highest monthly revenue in Dec 2025; focus remains on quality and growth.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics plans Feb 6, 2026 earnings call, highlighting cost control boosting profitability.
Investments in digital enhancements, automation, and integrated logistics expand customer reach.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics plans Feb 6, 2026 earnings call, highlighting cost control boosting profitability.
Investments in digital enhancements, automation, and integrated logistics expand customer reach.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics Ltd announces resignation of Mayank Dwivedi, National Head - Sales & Marketing, effective January 29, 2026.
Dwivedi cited personal reasons for his resignation and requested immediate relief from duties despite a 2-month notice period.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics Ltd announces resignation of Mayank Dwivedi, National Head - Sales & Marketing, effective January 29, 2026.
Dwivedi cited personal reasons for his resignation and requested immediate relief from duties despite a 2-month notice period.

news.title:
CRISIL downgraded Allcargo Logistics' ratings to 'CRISIL A/CRISIL A2' with a negative outlook, citing weak operating performance and subdued profitability.
CRISIL also withdrew ratings for Rs. 507 crore term loans due to repayment and Rs. 508 crore bank facilities transferred to Allcargo Global Ltd post demerger.
news.summary:
CRISIL downgraded Allcargo Logistics' ratings to 'CRISIL A/CRISIL A2' with a negative outlook, citing weak operating performance and subdued profitability.
CRISIL also withdrew ratings for Rs. 507 crore term loans due to repayment and Rs. 508 crore bank facilities transferred to Allcargo Global Ltd post demerger.

news.title:
CCI imposes a ₹50 lakh penalty on Allcargo Logistics for alleged non-compliance with Section 6(2) of the Competition Act.
Penalty pertains to acquisition of stake in Gati Kintetsu Express; Allcargo may consider legal actions.
news.summary:
CCI imposes a ₹50 lakh penalty on Allcargo Logistics for alleged non-compliance with Section 6(2) of the Competition Act.
Penalty pertains to acquisition of stake in Gati Kintetsu Express; Allcargo may consider legal actions.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics' board meeting is scheduled for February 5, 2026, to review Q3 and nine-month financial results ending December 31, 2025.
The financial results will be available on Allcargo's official website post the board meeting.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics' board meeting is scheduled for February 5, 2026, to review Q3 and nine-month financial results ending December 31, 2025.
The financial results will be available on Allcargo's official website post the board meeting.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics now covers 100% of India's PIN codes, expanding from 21,000 to 32,000 PINs.
It doubled direct serviceable PINs to 10,000 via distribution centers and launched the AI-driven AER network.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics now covers 100% of India's PIN codes, expanding from 21,000 to 32,000 PINs.
It doubled direct serviceable PINs to 10,000 via distribution centers and launched the AI-driven AER network.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics' demerger approved by NCLT on Oct 10, 2025; shareholders received shares in Allcargo Global at 1:1 ratio.
Demerger is tax-neutral; acquisition costs split as 87.9% to demerged, 12.1% to resulting company.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics' demerger approved by NCLT on Oct 10, 2025; shareholders received shares in Allcargo Global at 1:1 ratio.
Demerger is tax-neutral; acquisition costs split as 87.9% to demerged, 12.1% to resulting company.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics faces selling pressure, hitting lower circuit with no buyers.
The stock underperforms broader indices and sector peers amid downturn.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics faces selling pressure, hitting lower circuit with no buyers.
The stock underperforms broader indices and sector peers amid downturn.

news.title: Allcargo reports a 21% YoY and 1% MoM rise in CFS volumes for October.
news.summary: Allcargo reports a 21% YoY and 1% MoM rise in CFS volumes for October.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics shared audio recording of Q2 FY25 earnings call.
Recording held on Nov 17, 2025, available on company's website for access.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics shared audio recording of Q2 FY25 earnings call.
Recording held on Nov 17, 2025, available on company's website for access.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics' H1 FY26 revenue surpasses ₹1,000 Cr, up 11% YoY post-merger.
EBITDA grows 23%, PBT jumps 88% sequentially; new CEO & CFO appointed.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics' H1 FY26 revenue surpasses ₹1,000 Cr, up 11% YoY post-merger.
EBITDA grows 23%, PBT jumps 88% sequentially; new CEO & CFO appointed.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics to demerge int'l supply chain into a separate entity from Nov 1, 2025.
Domestic express & consultative logistics merged; new int'l entity listed by Q4 FY26.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics to demerge int'l supply chain into a separate entity from Nov 1, 2025.
Domestic express & consultative logistics merged; new int'l entity listed by Q4 FY26.

news.title:
Allcargo Logistics reports Q2 net loss of 40M INR vs profit of 170M YOY.
Q2 revenue rises to 5.4B INR, up from 4.8B INR YOY.
news.summary:
Allcargo Logistics reports Q2 net loss of 40M INR vs profit of 170M YOY.
Q2 revenue rises to 5.4B INR, up from 4.8B INR YOY.
